# Identity Conformance Suite

Runtime and source controls for OIDC authorization, token exchange, introspection, revocation, and Connect scope-enforcement contracts.

## Requirement Family Coverage

| Family | Focus | Requirements | Unique mapped checks |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: |
| `I-*` | OIDC authorization, token, userinfo, introspection, revocation, and JWKS contracts. | `12` | `19` |
| `C-*` | Connect endpoint auth gates, scope gates, CORS, payload limits, and proxy binding. | `10` | `22` |
| `O-*` | Operational integrity and cross-surface runtime coverage. | `4` | `6` |

## Full Requirement Coverage

### `I-*`

OIDC authorization, token, userinfo, introspection, revocation, and JWKS contracts.

<details>
<summary><code>I-001</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.oidc.authorize.request_parse` | `source` | `pass` | OIDC authorize endpoint parses and validates authorization requests. |
| `runtime.oidc.authorize.invalid_request` | `runtime` | `pass` | OIDC authorize endpoint rejects missing required parameters. |

</details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

</details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

</details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

</details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |

</details>

</details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |

| `runtime.oidc.userinfo.token_required` | `runtime` | `pass` | OIDC userinfo endpoint returns invalid_token without bearer token. |

</details>

## Evidence Anchors

- [identity.conformance.json](snapshots/2026-03-28/identity.conformance.json) contains the full imported report payload.
- `requirements[]` maps standards-level requirement IDs to check IDs.
- `checks[]` contains the source and runtime assertions and their human-readable descriptions.
- `revision` identifies the current conformance revision and the number of hashed source files in scope.
- `evidence.sourceDigests[]` in the snapshot lists the referenced live source file digests.
- `history` contains the signed snapshot metadata, badge route, and history route for this suite.
